//: BOARD-SCOPED healthcheck config — NOT auto-read. It is deliberately NOT named railway.json: Railway auto-reads root railway.json/railway.toml for EVERY service in the repo, so a root railway.json pinning Dockerfile.board hijacked the Streamlit dashboard service into building the board (health_down 2026-07-08). To use this, set RAILWAY_CONFIG_FILE=railway.board.json on the BOARD service ONLY. The board already builds via its RAILWAY_DOCKERFILE_PATH=Dockerfile.board service var (see BOARD_DEPLOY.md), so this file is optional — it only adds the Railway-level healthcheckPath=/api/health (the Dockerfile.board HEALTHCHECK already covers container liveness). The Streamlit service uses the root Dockerfile; the Discord bot uses Dockerfile.bot (health /health).
